description: Recommended SQLite source-of-truth shape for Quantik opening-book graph artifacts.
notes: opening-book.v1 is a canonical graph contract.
Edge identity must preserve action_index; do not collapse edges by parent and child alone.
High-cardinality edge tables should prefer integer node_id references and encoded actions over repeated keys and move text.
Raw search observations belong in observation.v1.
QFEN is debug/interchange text, not the required hot lookup key.
